tools.name: policy.policyCreateOrUpdate
tools.description: Creates a new policy from scratch.

tools.name: policy.policyDelete
tools.description: Deletes a specific policy of the account by its ID.

tools.name: policy.policyEvaluate
tools.description: This endpoint consults all policies and checks the ones that satisfy the request body’s conditions.

tools.name: policy.policyGet
tools.description: Retrieves general information of a policy by its ID.

tools.name: policy.policyList
tools.description: Retrieves a list of all policies in the account and general information of each policy.

tools.name: policy.putApiPolicyEnginePoliciesId
tools.description: Updates an existing policy at your account.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
